Event: Magic Well - August 2024
Event Date: 18/08/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: B32


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Shadow Sniper Bow

When attacking, has a 22% chance of dealing 85% damage to a group of enemies.
Once in a while, the unit removes all movement-restring effects, stun, freeze, petrification, and fear. The unit also fires an arrow at the nearby enemy. On impact, the arrow deals physical damage equal to 200% of the unit's attack and splits up to 2 nearby targets, dealing physical damage equal to 150% of the unit's attack.

Requirements: 98-100
